heading: Exemption from restriction on transporting certain cargo
label: 55333 Exemption from restriction on transporting certain cargo
text: The 3-year documentation requirement of does not apply to a vessel designated as an American Great Lakes vessel during the period of its designation.section 55305(a) of this title
